courseOfferings.title: I.Com
courseOfferings.description: Accounting, commerce, economics, business maths & statistics — BISE Sahiwal. 110 seats (prospectus).

courseOfferings.title: ICS
courseOfferings.description: Multiple combinations: CS with Maths/Eco, Stats/Eco, or Stats/Maths — 110 seats.

courseOfferings.title: F.A. (IT)
courseOfferings.description: Information technology, Islamiat elective, economics — 1200 marks over two years.

courseOfferings.title: D.Com (PBTE)
courseOfferings.description: 1st shift 135 seats; 2nd shift (boys) 90 seats — light blue shirt in summer for 2nd shift.

courseOfferings.title: BS Commerce
courseOfferings.description: Eight semesters: management, marketing, finance, e-commerce, taxation, internship & viva — GCUF external finals.

courseOfferings.title: BS Accounting & Finance
courseOfferings.description: Professional accounting, audit, corporate finance, Islamic banking, financial modelling, and more.

courseOfferings.title: ADP Commerce
courseOfferings.description: Two-year associate degree under semester system — 60 seats. Foundation for career entry or lateral progression.

courseOfferings.title: CCA (6 months)
courseOfferings.description: Certificate in Computer Applications offered through PBTE Lahore — introduced in 2020. Contact the college office for the latest PBTE session schedule.
